channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: House passes revised Kalinga bill to address oil price surge and energy emergencies
item.description: The House of Representatives has approved the revised Kalinga bill, formally House Bill No. 9305, aimed at mitigating the effects of sudden oil price hikes due to crises like the ongoing Middle East s...

item.title: Deputy Governor Hamzat Confirmed as APC Governorship Candidate for Lagos 2027
item.description: The Lagos State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC) don officially select Deputy Governor Obafemi Hamzat as their governorship candidate for the 2027 elections. The primary election, wey ha...

item.title: NASCAR star Kyle Busch passes away at 41 following severe illness
item.description: Kyle Busch, a two-time NASCAR Cup Series champion and one of the most successful drivers across NASCAR’s three national series, has passed away at the age of 41. The Busch family, along with Richard C...

item.title: Saanich Man Sentenced After Conviction in Large-Scale Voyeurism Case Affecting 652 Victims
item.description: A man from Saanich, British Columbia, has been sentenced following his guilty plea in what has been identified as Canada’s largest voyeurism case, involving 652 victims. The case, which shocked the co...

item.title: Rita Moreno: Celebrating the Life and Career of an EGOT Award Winner
item.description: Rita Moreno, born in Puerto Rico and later relocating to New York City as a child, is a trailblazer in the entertainment industry and one of the few performers to achieve EGOT status, winning an Emmy,...

item.title: Bongeziwe Mabandla shares his journey and new album Ndingubani
item.description: Bongeziwe Mabandla, the acclaimed South African singer-songwriter from Tsolo, Eastern Cape, has been making waves internationally with his unique Afro-folk sound infused with electronic elements. His ...

item.title: Rivers Monarch Encourages Education and Pledges Support for Students
item.description: Eze Moses Nwokocha, the Eze Aligwu of Usomini in Ogba/Egbema/Ndoni LGA, don speak say education na very important tool wey fit drive national and community development. During event for Port Harcourt ...

item.title: Legal Experts Assert Oil Companies Can Be Held Liable for Climate-Related Damages
item.description: Over the past several years, numerous local and state governments in the U.S. have filed lawsuits against petroleum companies seeking compensation for the billions in costs associated with flooding, s...

item.title: Middle East Tensions Push Global Energy Prices to Four-Year High
item.description: Global energy markets experienced a serious price increase this week due to escalating conflict in the Middle East. This region is crucial as it provides about one-third of the world’s oil and importa...

item.title: EAC Countries Begin Coordinated Regional Military Drill
item.description: Troops from East African Community (EAC) member states have started a big joint military exercise, showing strong commitment to regional security and defense cooperation. Soldiers and equipment from B...

item.title: Kerala Government Repeals 2023 Land Act and Sets Up Judge-Led Vigilance Commission
item.description: The V D Satheesan-led UDF government in Kerala has announced a major policy change by deciding to repeal the Kerala Land Assignment (Amendment) Act, 2023, along with the 2025 operational rules. This m...

item.title: Former Kitchener neurologist Jeffrey Sloka faces two new sexual assault charges following earlier acquittals
item.description: Jeffrey Sloka, a former neurologist from Kitchener, Ontario, is facing two new sexual assault charges related to alleged incidents that took place in 2011 and 2013. This development comes just weeks a...

item.title: Top 10 Streaming TV Shows to Watch in May 2026
item.description: May 2026 offers a rich variety of streaming content for TV enthusiasts, featuring both beloved classics and fresh releases. Paramount+ brings back the acclaimed sci-fi franchise Battlestar Galactica, ...

item.title: Ex-bank workers convicted for misusing N7.8 million from government palliative scheme
item.description: For Kaduna, two former bank staff, Obadofin Bamise and Hadiza Yakubu, don face seven years imprisonment after dem admit say dem misappropriate funds wey belong to customers linked to the federal gover...

item.title: Rock In Rio Lisbon: A Unique Festival Combining Music, Innovation and Community
item.description: Rock In Rio Lisbon is a large-scale, carefully curated music festival held in Parque Tejo, Lisbon, attracting up to 100,000 attendees per day. The 2026 edition features a diverse line-up, including Ka...

item.title: Aden McCarthy credits mental coaching for strong debut season at Kaizer Chiefs
item.description: Aden McCarthy has had an impressive first full season with Kaizer Chiefs, cementing his place in the starting lineup while handling the expectations that come with being the son of former Chiefs defen...

item.title: Globe Telecom Reports Strong Q1 2026 Growth Across Mobile, Broadband, and Digital Services
item.description: Globe Telecom delivered a solid start to 2026, showing sustained growth and stable profitability despite global uncertainties. Consolidated gross service revenues reached P42 billion, up 5% year-on-ye...

item.title: Eddie Van Halen Captured Backstage at the Metro Center Ahead of 5150 Tour
item.description: On March 16, 1986, Van Halen performed at the Metro Center in Rockford, Illinois, in a show that served as an early preview of their upcoming 5150 Tour. This concert marked one of the first performanc...

item.title: AUDA-NEPAD urges accelerated efforts for African trade and development
item.description: Delegates in Cape Town marked 25 years of AUDA-NEPAD with calls for faster African economic integration, warning that the continent risks falling further behind global trade and development. Former Pr...

item.title: Remembering Maria McCloy: The Woman Who Shaped Johannesburg’s Culture
item.description: Maria McCloy was a remarkable figure whose influence stretched across Johannesburg’s cultural, social, and creative landscapes. She brought people together across class, art, music, fashion, and polit...
